# Fri, 25 Oct 2024 04:06:36 GMT

# Fri, 25 Oct 2024 04:06:36 GMT
ENTRYPOINT ["docker-entrypoint.sh"]
# Fri, 25 Oct 2024 04:06:36 GMT
EXPOSE map[27017/tcp:{}]
# Fri, 25 Oct 2024 04:06:36 GMT
CMD ["mongod"]
